parameters.name: rgbaunit
parameters.label: RGBA Units
parameters.description: Specify the color values using different ranges. Note that this is only for purposes of setting the color, the data values in the always use the RGBA Unit range 0-1.

parameters.name: operand
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Choose which composite operation is performed from this menu. Search the web for 'blend modes' for more detailed information on the effects of each type.

parameters.name: swaporder
parameters.label: Swap Order
parameters.description: Swaps the order of the composite with the input.

parameters.name: colorb
parameters.label: Colorb
parameters.description: Sets the red, green and blue color channels. Clicking on the color swatch opens a color picker with RGB and HSV (Hue, Sat, and Value) pickers.

examples.label: Set solid red background
examples.code:
c = op('constant1')
c.par.colorr = 1.0
c.par.colorg = 0.0
c.par.colorb = 0.0
c.par.colora = 1.0

examples.label: Set semi-transparent white
examples.code:
c = op('constant1')
c.par.colorr = 1.0
c.par.colorg = 1.0
c.par.colorb = 1.0
c.par.colora = 0.5

examples.label: Pulse color with audio
examples.description: Drive the red channel from an audio input CHOP.
